channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-06-27
item.description:
Our open-source research community has seen exciting updates across multiple projects. The `giladfeldman/escicheck` repository has been synchronized with the `escicheckapp` repository, bringing the `main` branch up to date with the latest `effectcheck` version. Meanwhile, the `shaheedazaad/auto-zcurve` project has improved its validation note with a revised note and added citation, enhancing the project's credibility. Notably, the `giovannacdelsordo/output-it-forward` project has expanded its reach by adding a Chrome Webstore link, making it easier for users to access the Output-it-Forward extension. These updates demonstrate the community's commitment to collaboration and progress, with projects continually building upon and improving each other's work. As our community continues to grow and evolve, we celebrate these achievements and look forward to seeing the impact of these updates on our shared research goals.

35 commits across 4 active repositories this week.

Dormant repos revived: escicheck, auto-zcurve

Most active:

docpluck15 commits
metacheck10 commits
regcheck7 commits
escicheck3 commits

item.title: escicheck: activity update
item.description:
giladfeldman/escicheck

The `main` branch was updated with a commit that synchronized it with the `escicheckapp` repository at version `f37b5a1`, which corresponds to `effectcheck` version `0.6.6`, as stated in the commit message "sync from escicheckapp@f37b5a1 (effectcheck v0.6.6)". No other branches were worked on in this set of commits. This commit brought the `main` branch in line with the specified version of `effectcheck`. The commit was referenced as `#20`, indicating it was related to a specific issue or pull request. Only the `main` branch was affected by this change, with no other branches mentioned in the commit message.

⚠ This repository was dormant and has recently become active again.

View all commits →

item.title: auto-zcurve: activity update
item.description:
shaheedazaad/auto-zcurve

The `main` branch was worked on, where the validation note was revised and a citation was included, as stated in the commit message "Revise validation note and include citation". No other branches were modified in this set of commits. The revision of the validation note and addition of a citation are the only changes made in this update. There are no new features or modules added in this commit. The commit only modified existing content on the `main` branch. No other work was done outside of the `main` branch in this set of commits.

⚠ This repository was dormant and has recently become active again.

View all commits →
